heading: THE PLATFORM DIFFERENCE
subheading: TRADITIONAL ACADEMIES ENCOURAGE DEBT; WE FOSTER COLLABORATIVE EFFICIENCY.

problem.title: THE STANDARD STRUGGLE
points: Infinite video lectures that build a false sense of security.
Complete isolation during challenging analytical cycles.
Unchecked error propagation and formula leaks.

solution.title: THE GATE IT PROTOCOL
points: Milestone execution maps updated weekly to scale confidence.
Instant system architecture and peer analysis workspace.
Curated short note hubs that highlight common pitfalls.
